svg.title: HOLO-Codex wordmark options
svg.desc: Three restrained wordmark treatments for HOLO-Codex.

text.font-family: 'SF Pro Display', 'OpenAI Sans', Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

g.text: Quiet, modern, closest to a developer tool wordmark.

text.font-family: 'SF Pro Display', Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

g.text: Stronger CLI flavor, but the underscore can over-index on terminal UI.

text.font-family: 'SF Pro Rounded', 'SF Pro Display', Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

g.text: Warmer and more ownable, but farther from the Codex reference.
